title: Change memory: master
summary: Repo-local context for 9 changed repo paths on master.
body:
Repo-local change memory generated from the current git diff.

Goal: preserve the durable context another agent should receive when it works in this repo later.

How to verify:
- Add the exact test, build, or manual verification command when you refine this memory.

Improve this packet when more context is known:
- The actual feature, fix, or refactor rationale.
- Why the change was made, including relevant bugs, issues, decisions, and code explanations.
- The package, API, command, or architectural pattern future agents should understand, verify, or reuse.
- Any gotchas, follow-up risks, or branch-specific assumptions.

Promote beyond this repo only after explicit org/global review.

context.fact: Current branch master changes 9 repo paths.
context.why: Branch change memory gives future agents durable context from the git diff when they continue, review, or verify this work.
context.trigger: Recall when asking what changed on this branch, preparing a PR review, or resuming this work.
context.action: Use the changed file list and diff summary as orientation, then inspect the actual diff and source files before making further edits.
context.verification: Generated from git diff and refreshed by kage pr summarize or kage propose --from-diff.
context.risk_if_forgotten: Future agents may repeat orientation work, miss branch-specific assumptions, or ignore files touched by this change.
context.stale_when: The branch diff changes substantially, the branch is merged, or a newer change-memory packet supersedes it.

reasons: has durable trigger, rationale, issue context, or explanation
